comment: BRAIN M4/M5 — madenlenmiş üretim yasaları (kaynak: mamilas-brain-intelligence-mined memory + eski hat kazısı). TEK KANON: hem src/core/agentProtocol.ts hem scripts/mamilas-command.mjs bu dosyadan okur; ayna kopya YOK. Maddeler evrensel kilit değildir (overridePolicy): çatışma hükmü AJANIN — kod direktif keyword'ünden madde bastırmaz (polarite bilinemez); overrideKeys yalnız dokümantasyondur (bu madde tipik hangi Mami konusuyla çatışır). Author çatışan maddeyi image'da suppressedContext / motion'da risks altında adlandırır; jüri dayanaksız suppression'ı failing check sayar.

universal.text: Detail triad: the frame carries one environmental-pressure detail on a body or surface, one micro-action or physiological event, and one concrete optical event of light or material behaviour (never a mood adjective).

Self-contained: the prompt rebuilds the full continuity state (wardrobe wear, accumulated dust or weather, identity clause, environment) from zero — the engine has no memory of a previous scene and the prompt never says "as before".
The prompt closes as a clean motion-ready still, half a second before one concrete named physical event.

Empty quality tokens appear without source backing: 4K, 8K, masterpiece, ultra-detailed, premium, cinematic, stunning, beautiful, polished, award-winning — replace with a concrete lens, film-stock, grain or cadence fact.
The palette is written as a closed hue/color list instead of a saturation/contrast/bias regime — closed lists collapse to duotone in the engine.

animation.text: 2D-medium law: the prompt states WHICH surfaces carry flat-cel treatment (the figure) versus which surfaces are painted or photoreal (the background) — the gap between them IS the style; a franchise or brand name never substitutes for this physical split.
The world is invoked by a style adjective or franchise name instead of physical material facts (ink line, painted cel, brushed clay) — names do not fix plasticity; materials do.

photoreal.text: Photoreal counter-terms are present against the engine's plastic-commercial default: negative fill, motivated light, subtle 35mm film grain, raw skin micro-texture (or equivalents earned by this shot).

nano_banana_2.text: Camera grammar comes early and numeric: a numeric lens and f-stop (e.g. "locked 40mm at seated eye level, f/8 deep focus") — never a vague "cinematic lens".

motionUniversal.text: Physics-First Motion: camera and subject movement is written in the physical vocabulary of mass and cadence (organic handheld drift, macro lens breathing, heavy object momentum, step-printed stutter earned by the world) — never as an abstract camera command.
A generic camera-move verb (pan/zoom/dolly/truck/orbit) stands alone as the motion instruction instead of a mass-and-cadence description.
The prompt opens from an observable frame inventory: every moving or protected element it names is visibly present in the APPROVE start frame — nothing is invented off-frame.
Exactly one single-action motion: one moving element with one cause-effect-settle arc; everything else is explicitly held pixel-stable.
Still-lips law: every mouth in frame stays closed and motionless; voice-over is a separate ElevenLabs layer and never enters this clip.
The prompt writes dialogue, speech, lip movement, mouth animation or any talking cue — the i2v engine never carries dialogue; VO lives on a separate audio layer.

kling.text: Native-audio SFX spine: the prompt names 2-4 concrete diegetic sound sources as physical events (what vibrates, scrapes, compresses — e.g. "dry rope fibers creaking under load, low hull groan"), never as post labels.
A sound is named instead of physically described ("explosion sound", "dramatic music") — write the physics of the sound or leave the audio line out.
